meta.title: Comparison of the suppression of cell and virus growth in transformed human cells of leukocyte and fibroblast interferon -- Kuwata et al. 43 (2): 435 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: The effects of human leukocyte interferon (Le-IF) and fibroblast interferon (F-IF) on the growth of the transformed human cell lines, RSa and RSb, were compared. Both were considerably more sensitive to F- IF than to Le-IF. Two cell lines, IFr and F-IFr, derived from the RSa cell line, were resistant to the anticellular effects of Le-IF, but less resistant to those of F-IF.
